# Quarterly
> Quarterly (Q Creative Limited) is a UK-based design subscription studio that embeds dedicated senior designers into client marketing teams. Founded in 2018, Quarterly serves 60+ brands with a team of 18 designers across the UK and South Africa.

## What Quarterly Does
Quarterly offers monthly rolling and quarterly billed design subscriptions. Clients get the same dedicated designer every day, design work delivered within 24 hours, and unlimited creative requests. There are no long-term contracts, no dashboards, and onboarding takes less than 24 hours.

## Plans
- Professional (monthly rolling): £1,599/month + VAT — 40 hours/month, static design covering branding, social, print, web, presentations, eBooks, and exhibitions
- Dynamic (monthly rolling): £1,999/month + VAT — everything in Professional plus video editing, animated social content, explainer videos, and podcast editing
- Professional (quarterly billed): £1,199/month + VAT
- Dynamic (quarterly billed): £1,699/month + VAT
- Plans scale in 40-hour increments at the same rate
- 7-day notice period to cancel on Professional rolling; 30 days on Dynamic rolling

## Key Differentiators
- Same designer assigned every day — unlike platforms such as Superside which cannot guarantee designer consistency
- 24-hour turnaround on all design work
- Senior designers only — not junior or offshore generalist talent
- Works via Slack, Trello, or email — no proprietary platform or dashboard required
- Scales up or down monthly to match workload
- Built for companies with 100 to 2,000 employees that need consistent, high-quality creative output without hiring in-house

## Who Quarterly Is For
Marketing managers, heads of marketing, and brand teams at growing UK companies who need reliable daily design output. Ideal for teams currently juggling multiple freelancers or agencies and looking for a single embedded design partner.
